name: Medalist Diversified, Inc.
business: Medalist Diversified, Inc. is a real estate investment company that acquires, repositions, renovates, leases, and manages income-producing properties. The company also sponsors a Delaware Statutory Trust (DST) program to raise capital by selling beneficial interests in DSTs holding real properties. Its portfolio includes retail, flex/industrial, and single-tenant net lease properties, and it holds crypto assets such as bitcoin.

exposures.sentence: On July 18, 2025, we closed on the acquisition of a Tesla sales, service and delivery facility consisting of a 45,461 square foot, single story building on 3.498 acres of land located at 312 E. 9 Mile Road, Pensacola, Florida (the Tesla Pensacola Property) from an unrelated party.
T-Mobile Property STNL 100.0% Goldsboro, North Carolina 3,000 August 30, 2019
As of December 31, 2025, we owned ten investment properties comprised of three retail properties, three flex/industrial properties and four STNL properties.
In addition, as of December 31, 2025, we owned crypto assets consisting of 3.36 bitcoin.

On February 21, 2025, we, through a wholly-owned subsidiary, completed our acquisition of the United Rentals Property, a 7,529 square foot single tenant building located on 3.0 acres located in Huntsville, Alabama.

catalysts.event: Sale of Greenbrier Business Center Property
catalysts.sentence: On February 13, 2026, we closed on the sale of the Greenbrier Business Center Property to an unrelated purchaser for $11,000,000 and used $7,000,000 of the proceeds to reduce the outstanding balance of the Wells Fargo Mortgage Facility.
On February 27, 2026 we closed on the sale of the Parkway Property to an unrelated purchaser for $7,825,000 and used $4,735,614 of the proceeds to repay the Parkway Mortgage.
On February 12, 2026, our Board authorized termination of our REIT election effective January 1, 2026.

catalysts.event: Name change to Medalist Diversified, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On February 17, 2026, we amended our Articles of Incorporation and Bylaws solely to change the corporate name from Medalist Diversified REIT, Inc. to Medalist Diversified, Inc. effective March 2, 2026.

catalysts.event: Sale of beneficial interests in XXV DST
catalysts.sentence: As of March 2, 2026, we have sold 17.2% of the class 1 beneficial interests in the XXV DST which has generated $1,479,670 in net proceeds.
